title: Dælar vuv Tertarrnek

{{Quote|That vuv Tertarrnek is so successful is not only a testament to his abilities but also demonstrates once again how the Empire's narrow-mindedness leaves it vulnerable.|General [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Dælar vuv Tertarrnek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Covallon]] who worked as a mole for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Due to his [[Species/Legends|species]] bestial appearance the Rebels were able to pass him off as a pet and gift him to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harlov Jarnek]].

==Biography==
Dælar vuv Tertarrnek was a [[Covallon]], a quadrupedal species of bestial appearance. He joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and served as a deep cover mole for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]. As the Covallon rarely ventured into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the Alliance was able to pass Dælar off as a non-[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] animal and had him given to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harlov Jarnek]] as a pet.<ref name="CRO" />

Moff Jarnek took Dælar vuv Tertarrnek to his Palace on [[Spirador]], where he ruled the [[Tandon sector/Legends|Tandon sector]]. Janrek grew very fond of his loyal "pet" who seemed to instinctively know what Janrek wanted. Dælar achieved this responsiveness through his natural empathetic ability, common to all Covallon. The Moff brought Dælar everywhere with him, including to numerous high-security meetings. This allowed vuv Tertarrnek to gain information about fleet and troop movements, as well as learning top-priority access codes. Dælar related this information back to the Alliance via a tight-beam [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] hidden in his pen. This was relayed through a stealth [[Probe droid/Legends|probot]] stationed in the [[Spirador system/Legends|Spirador system]]. With this data, Alliance convoys were able to avoid Imperial entanglements in the sector.<ref name="CRO" />

While vuv Tertarrnek was extremely successful in extracting information from the Moff, there was one drawback from his position: as the Moff kept him so close by, his opportunities to relay information were infrequent. However, despite this, General Cracken still considered him an important asset to [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Personality and traits==
Dælar was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Covallon that had four legs and a bestial looking body partially covered in fur. He had human-like eyes though. For Moff Jarnek he played the part of a loyal and intelligent pet, never revealing that he had sentience and significantly more intelligence then the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] gave him credit.<ref name="CRO" />

==Skills and abilities==
As a Covallon, Dælar had natural empathic abilities that allowed him to sense the emotions of others. He was very perceptive and played the part of a simple pet very well. Despite his bestial appearance he could use modern technology as well as any other species and was moderately skilled with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Equipment==
Dælar did not carry anything on him in order to keep up the guise of being a simple household pet however hidden in his pen he had a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|Sporting blaster]] and a long-range tight-beam [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dælar vuv Tertarrnek was designed by [[Stephen Crane]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]].
